mapper.select:
SELECT pa.id, pa.user_id, pa.asset_name, pa.purchase_price, pa.purchase_date, pa.remark,
ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages FROM project_assets pa LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = pa.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND pa.asset_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.assetName},'%')
ORDER BY pa.id DESC
